zh.Stobhill, Midlothian, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安斯托比爾
zh.Midlothian, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安
zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhall於1389年之後出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安斯托比爾時，他的父親John Drummond8637歲，母親Elizabeth Sinclair8637歲。他於1415年與Margaret Ruthven在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安斯托比爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1445年在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhall于1389年之后出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安斯托比爾时，他的父亲John Drummond8637岁，母亲Elizabeth Sinclair8637岁。他于1415年与Margaret Ruthven在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安斯托比爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1445年在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安。

nameMeanings.name: Drummond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places, notably the barony of Drummond, which is probably identical with the parish of Drymen (Stirlingshire), named from Gaelic drumainn, a derivative of druim ‘ridge’. It has been said that the principal family of this name are descended from a Hungarian nobleman, Maurice, who accompanied Edgar Atheling and his sister Margaret to Scotland in 1068, where she married King Malcolm III. However, there is disagreement on whether or not this was the case.

English: occasionally perhaps from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Dromund (Old Norse Drómundr, apparently from a word denoting a kind of Byzantine galley prevalent till the 12th cent., from Greek dromōn ‘runner’).

variants.name: Drummonds
meanings: Scottish: variant of Drummond , with post-medieval excrescent -s. In Britain this surname is found mainly in County Durham.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhall was born after 1389, in Stobhill, Midlothian, Scotland, his father, John Drummond, was 8637 and his mother, Elizabeth Sinclair, was 8637. He married Margaret Ruthven in 1415, in Stobhill, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1445, in Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhall est né après 1389, à Stobhill, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, John Drummond, avait 8637 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Sinclair, avait 8637 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Ruthven en 1415, à Stobhill, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1445, à Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhall nach 1389 in Stobhill, Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Drummond 8637 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Sinclair 8637. Er hat 1415 in Stobhill, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom Margaret Ruthven geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1445 in Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhall è nato il dopo il 1389 nel Stobhill, Midlothian, Scotland, il suo padre, John Drummond, aveva 8637 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Sinclair, aveva 8637 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Ruthven nel 1415, nel Stobhill, Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1445, nel Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhallが1389年以後にスコットランドミドロスアンストビルで生まれた時，父John Drummondは8637歳，母Elizabeth Sinclairは8637歳であった。1415年にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンストビルでMargaret Ruthvenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1445年にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhall(이)가 1389년 이후 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 스토브힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Drummond(은)는 8637세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Sinclair(은)는 8637세였다. 그는 1415년 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 스토브힐에서 Margaret Ruthven(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1445년 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhall nasceu após 1389, em Stobhill, Midlothian, Scotland, seu pai, John Drummond, tinha 8637 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Sinclair, tinha 8637 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Ruthven em 1415, em Stobhill, Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1445, em Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhall родился после 1389 г. в местности стобхилл, мидлотян, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John Drummond было 8637 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Sinclair, 8637. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Ruthven в 1415 г. в местности стобхилл, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1445 г. в местности мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания.
